flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fordham University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.2k → $64.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fordham University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.2k → $64.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fordham University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
